author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
FINAL FANTASY VII REVELATION – Reveal Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
FINAL FANTASY VII REVELATION is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in spring 2027!  

As the world teeters on the brink of annihilation, your final battle against Sephiroth awaits. 

A meteor mars the sky, monstrous planetary guardians wreak havoc across the globe, and the fires of war rage. Now, it is up to Cloud and his companions to decide the planet's fate and bring a legendary conflict to its conclusion. 

In the final chapter of the FINAL FANTASY VII remake project, the scale has never been larger and the stakes have never been higher. Take to the skies and explore a boundless world, fight alongside a fully assembled party, master strategic and dynamic combat, and prepare yourself for the climactic finale. 

#NintendoSwitch2 #FFVII #REVELATION 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

Follow Nintendo of America
X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/nintendo

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Everbloom – Announcement Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Everbloom is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in spring 2027. 

Build your dream homestead from the ground up in a 3D world and watch as the world reacts to your imagination. Your creativity even extends to the harvest, where you might need to set your peppers on fire to make them spicy, or give chocolate to your cow to get chocolate milk. Prepare for a single-player and multiplayer farming life-sim where curiosity is your greatest asset!  
     
#Everbloom #NintendoSwitch

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot
